topics.name: user-events
topics.description: Main topic for user activity events (purchases, views, clicks, etc.)

topics.name: user-events-dlq
topics.description: Dead Letter Queue for failed event processing

topics.name: analytics-commands
topics.description: Commands for triggering batch analytics jobs

notes.partitioning_strategy: Events are partitioned by user_id to maintain ordering per user
notes.compression: Snappy compression for balance between CPU and storage
notes.replication: Set to 1 for local dev, increase to 3 in production
